title: X rebuilt its neglected Android app from scratch, and the bug reports are already rolling in
summary: After nearly a year of work, the company has stopped patching the old app and rebuilt it from scratch. Still, for Android users who watched the old X trip over basic tasks, working scrolling counts as progress.
caption: output/2026-07-21/x-rebuilt-its-neglected-android-app-from-scratch-and-the-bug-reports-a.txt
